global.title: Volvo just made public EV charging a lot less annoying
global.summary: Volvo EX90 drivers in the US can now charge at public charging networks, including Superchargers and IONNA DC fast chargers, without opening an app or pulling out a credit card.

global.title: Tesla HW3 claim grows to 7,000 owners, gets law firm backing for collective action
global.summary: The Dutch collective claim against Tesla over broken “Full Self-Driving” promises on Hardware 3 vehicles has reached nearly 7,000 verified participants and secured backing from law firm Kennedy Van der Laan for a formal legal action. The initiative, which launched in April with 3,000 signups in its

global.title: Subaru announces 2027 Solterra EV prices remain under $40,000 after a major upgrade
global.summary: After a complete overhaul in 2026, the 2027 Subaru Solterra will go on sale at the same price, starting at under $40,000.

global.title: California solar is crushing natural gas this year
global.summary: California’s utility-scale solar plants are generating more electricity than natural gas for most days of the year in 2026, according to new data from the US Energy Information Administration (EIA).

global.title: BMW opens i3 orders months ahead of schedule as demand takes off
global.summary: The new i3 was set to go on sale this fall, but BMW opened orders on Thursday, months ahead of schedule, due to strong demand.

global.title: Honda and QuantumScape (QS) team up to make ‘game-changing’ solid-state batteries
global.summary: Honda and QuantumScape (QS) announced a new partnership to commercialize solid-state batteries for EVs and more.

global.title: Heybike sale up to $1,000 e-bike savings from $999, Anker SOLIX 24-hour flash sale on 508Wh to 7,680Wh power stations, Hiboy, more

global.title: Sweden tells EU to reject Tesla ‘FSD’ unless speeding is removed
global.summary: Sweden’s transport authority has told the European Union it should vote against approving Tesla’s “Full Self-Driving (Supervised)” across the bloc unless the system’s ability to exceed posted speed limits is removed. The recommendation, in a previously unreported April 30 letter to the EU’s Technica

global.title: The Ford Mustang Mach-e is on borrowed time as more affordable EVs roll in
global.summary: After discontinuing the all-electric F-150 Lightning, it looks like the Mustang Mach-E is also running out of time. Ford is preparing to launch a new generation of EVs that are more affordable, more efficient, and more profitable, starting with the $30,000 pickup in 2027.

global.title: Tesla teases new FSD features — but it’s still not the self-driving promised
global.summary: Elon Musk says Tesla’s Full Self-Driving will soon remember your parking preferences and let you talk to it through Grok, like giving directions to an Uber driver.
